title: cenchropsis ekmaniana
intro: Cenchropsis ekmaniana, also known as the "Mekong River plant", is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving pain, as well as showing potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a poultice or a topical application to treat various health conditions.
